holdings.infoBox: IBAT is an equity ETF with a total of 86 individual holdings. The top holdings are Murata Manufacturing stock at 12.20%, Bloom Energy at 10.57%, Samsung SDI at 6.44%, Furukawa Electric at 5.09%, and Air Liquide at 4.88%.

overview.description: The iShares Energy Storage & Materials ETF (IBAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a price-weighted index of companies involved in energy storage solutions around the globe. The fund seeks to provide long-term growth opportunities from companies involved in the transition to a low-carbon economy. IBAT was launched on Mar 19, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: STOXX Global Energy Storage and Materials Index
